steps.title: Calculate the cost of markers
steps.content:
Olivia bought 11 packages of markers at 4 dollars per package. Multiply to find the total cost:
$$11 \times 4 = 44$$
She spent 44 dollars on markers.

steps.title: Find the number of folders
steps.content:
She spent 68 dollars total and 44 dollars on markers, so:
$$68 - 44 = 24$$
This is the amount left for folders. Since each folder costs 1 dollar, Olivia bought 24 folders.
